sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_time DateTime) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = toStartOfHour(toDateTime('2023-04-21 11:59:59')) WHERE event_time = toDateTime('2023-04-21 10:20:30');
SELECT toStartOfHour(toDateTime64('2023-04-21 10:20:30', 3)) AS rounded_time FROM test_dates;
